decisions.what: Used named export for GlowCard with ReactNode/className props and added aria-hidden to decorative gradient layers.
decisions.why: Spec requested named export and decorative layers should not be exposed to assistive tech.

decisions.what: Used '@/' alias imports in Features.tsx for ScrollReveal and GlowCard.
decisions.why: vite.config.ts and existing components like MorphingButton consistently use the '@/' alias for src imports.

decisions.what: Assigned feature.icon to a capitalized local Icon variable inside the map.
decisions.why: JSX requires capitalized identifiers for component types; lowercase 'feature.icon' would render as a DOM tag.

decisions.what: Default-exported Features and rendered it directly after Hero inside main.
decisions.why: Spec required default export and structure: Header > main > Hero > Features.
